prompt: My colab session was working fine an hour ago but now 'colab exec' gives SSL errors. Is my training dead? How do I recover without losing progress? PID was 903 and checkpoints were in /content/checkpoints/.

assertions.text: Explains SSL errors are often transient, not necessarily fatal
Shows how to verify session with colab sessions / colab status
Mentions the background PID (903) may still be alive despite SSL errors
Mentions ~2-4 hour session lifetime and silent termination
Shows recovery: new session → re-upload → resume from checkpoints
Advises downloading checkpoints before session dies: colab download
